title: CTM360 CYNA Connector
description: External import connector for CTM360 CYNA (Cyber News & Alerts). Imports cyber news, threat actor claims, CVE vulnerability mentions, and CTM360 advisories as STIX Reports and Vulnerabilities.
short_description: Imports CTM360 CYNA cyber news and alerts into OpenCTI as STIX Reports and Vulnerabilities, covering threat actor claims, CVE mentions, and CTM360 advisories.
